name: CSI Properties Limited
summary: CSI Properties Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment activities in Hong Kong, Singapore, the People's Republic of China, and Macau. The company operates through four segments: Commercial Property Holding, Residential Property Holding, Macau Property Holding, and Securities Investment. It invests and trades in commercial and residential properties. The company is also involved in securities trading and investment activities; issuing bonds; treasury management; and provision of management and property management services. CSI Properties Limited is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
